theme_archetype.mood: Focused, efficient, authoritative, clean, and top-notch modern
theme_archetype.justification: A high-end SaaS productivity app requires clarity and zero distractions. High contrast builds trust and emphasizes the data (todos), while precise typography feels premium.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H6 headings. Provides a sleek, geometric, modern look. Never use Inter for headings.

body.usage: Use for all body text, inputs, and buttons. High legibility at small sizes.

mono.usage: Use for MFA codes, OTP inputs, or encrypted hashes/keys.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-bold text-foreground
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-semibold text-foreground

colors.strategy: Swiss High-Contrast. Grayscale structural hierarchy with vibrant Electric Blue as the single primary action color. Red for destructive actions.

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use p-6 or p-8 for cards and modals. Use gap-6 or gap-8 in grids.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: The 'Control Room' Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Sidebars span 1 col, main content spans 3 cols.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid_marketing: For the landing page: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with gap-8. Mix tall and wide blocks for tension.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align forms, inputs, and dense lists. Center-align hero text on marketing pages. Use optical alignment for icons + text.

shadcn_overrides.Cards: Flat solid background, 1px border (border-border), max 8px radius. Hover state: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border-primary/20 transition-all duration-300.
shadcn_overrides.Buttons: Primary button is Electric Blue. Use fully rounded (rounded-full) for landing page, and rounded-md for the app dashboard.
shadcn_overrides.Modals: Backdrop blur is required (backdrop-blur-sm bg-black/40). Modal body must have generous padding (p-6).
shadcn_overrides.Navigation: Crystal Glass style for sticky nav: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70 border-b border-border.

custom_ui.TodoItem: Use a horizontal flex row. Checkbox on the left, Title/Desc flex-col in middle, tags/actions on right. Group hover to reveal actions (edit/delete).
custom_ui.PriorityLabels: High: text-red-500 bg-red-500/10; Med: text-yellow-500 bg-yellow-500/10; Low: text-blue-500 bg-blue-500/10

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Functional and precise. No bouncy animations. Everything should feel instant but smooth.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons/links must have explicit hover text/bg colors to maintain contrast.
motion_and_interactions.todo_complete: Use framer-motion layout animations. When completing a task, strike-through the text, drop opacity to 50%, and smoothly animate it to the bottom of the list.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3, ease: 'easeOut' }}

hero_background.description: Abstract shapes with pastel colors, useful for the landing page hero background (needs dark overlay or blur).
hero_background.usage: Landing page background. Apply opacity-20 or use as a blurred blob.

feature_image.description: Person typing on a black laptop at a marble desk.
feature_image.usage: Landing page 'How it works' or 'Features' section to add human element.

auth_background.description: Minimalistic abstract design featuring white geometric lines.
auth_background.usage: Use as a split-screen background for the Auth/Login/Signup page.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, checkboxes, modals) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='create-todo-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts (@fontsource/outfit, @fontsource/manrope) or import via Google Fonts in index.css.
Apply the color palette CSS variables in index.css for light and dark modes.
Use standard HTML tags for layout (div, section) and Shadcn for interactive components (Dialog, DropdownMenu, Checkbox, Select).
For the Landing Page, construct a high-impact hero with glassmorphism nav.
For the Dashboard, use the 'Control Room' grid pattern.
Never use purely transparent overlays over text/images; always add a blur or tint.
Implement the framer-motion layout wrapper on the Todo list to smoothly handle complete/delete repositioning.
